No: DRB1/SOR/220/2025-2026 78 Website Score/100 GDPDI Mar 2026 · E4 · 256 Assoc · 41 Countries · Worlds first Durga Puja website index 🌐 Global Rank #13 Asia Rank #7 India Rank #6 State Rank #5 🤖 AI Rank #1 🏆 Our Ranking → Celebrate the Grandeur of Bengali Festivities Stand out, Being you! 𝑨𝑰 𝑪𝒉𝒂𝒕𝒃𝒐𝒕 𝑨𝒔𝒌 𝑨𝒏𝒚𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈! We, the Bengali community in and around Aerospace Park, North Bangalore, warmly welcome you. This platform serves as a living archive-honouring cherished Bengali traditions, vibrant cultural expressions, and the spirit of communal harmony. Across continents and cultures, these festivities becomes the thread that binds Bengalis everywhere. From distant lands to familiar neighbourhoods, it is the time we gather-not just as individuals, but as one global community. Rooted in deep respect for our heritage and with heartfelt gratitude to all our visitors, this site aspires to illuminate the splendour and sanctity of these sacred festivities. Thank you for joining us and celebrating the spirit that unites us all. Durga Puja Kojagori Lakshmi Puja Kali Puja Saraswati Puja Noboborsho Poila boishak Family Day Outing দোল উৎসব ২০২৬ Holi 2026 স্বাগতম! “বাঙালিয়ানার আড়ম্বর উৎসবে মেতে উঠুন” নিজস্বতায় দীপ্ত হোন, হোন অনন্য এক পরিচয় ! আমরা, উত্তর বেঙ্গালুরুর এয়ারোস্পেস পার্ক ও তার আশেপাশের বাঙালি সমাজ, আপনাদের আন্তরিকভাবে আমন্ত্রণ জানাই। এই প্ল্যাটফর্মটি একটি জীবন্ত আর্কাইভ হিসেবে কাজ করে—যেখানে প্রিয় বাঙালি ঐতিহ্য, প্রাণবন্ত সাংস্কৃতিক অভিব্যক্তি এবং সাম্প্রদায়িক সম্প্রীতির চেতনার প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা জানানো হয়। বিশ্বের নানা প্রান্তে, নানা সংস্কৃতির মাঝে, এই উৎসবগুলোই বাঙালিদের এক অদৃশ্য বন্ধনে যুক্ত করে রাখে। দূরদেশে হোক বা চেনা পাড়ায়—এই সময় আমরা একত্রিত হই, শুধু ব্যক্তি হিসেবে নয়, এক বিশ্বব্যাপী বাঙালি পরিবার হিসেবে। আমাদের ঐতিহ্যের প্রতি গভীর শ্রদ্ধা এবং সকল দর্শনার্থীর প্রতি আন্তরিক কৃতজ্ঞতা নিয়ে, এই সাইটটি এই পবিত্র উৎসবগুলির জৌলুস ও পবিত্রতাকে উজ্জ্বল করে তোলার প্রয়াস। ��মাদের সঙ্গে যুক্ত থাকার জন্য এবং এই একতাবদ্ধতার চেতনাকে উদ্‌যাপন করার জন্য ধন্যবাদ। Heralding the Celebration to Come আসন্ন উৎসবের বার্তা বাহক Holi 2026 দোল উৎসব ১৪৩২ Click on the above image or text Saraswati Puja 2026 সরস্বতী পুজো ১৪৩২ Click on the above text or image Kojagori Lakshmi Puja Click on the above image or text Durgotsav 2025 দুর্গোৎসব ১৪৩২ Click on the above image or text Co-Partners Click on the above image Click on the above Image About · Bengali Association of Aerospace Park · Est. 2025 About Us Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) — a registered cultural society celebrating Bengali heritage in North Bangalore. 01 · Who We Are The Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) is a registered cultural society representing the Bengali community in and around Aerospace Park, North Bangalore, Karnataka. pages.content: Durga Puja 2025 at Aerospace Park | North Bengaluru’s First Grand Celebration How Far! Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore Durga Puja 2025 at Aerospace Park | North Bengaluru’s First Grand Celebration How Far! 14th March 2026 BAAP Ranked in Global Durga Puja Digital Index (GDPDI) — Worlds First Durga Puja Website Rankings by Animesh 15th March 2026 AI Chatbot for Durga Puja & Bengali Events | Bengali Association Aerospace Park Bangalore by Animesh 27th February 2026 Request for Membership by Animesh 25th February 2026 শুভারম্ভ ঐতিহ্যবাহী সংস্কৃতির রূপে রসে ও ছন্ধে- প্রবাসী বাঙালি উঠলো মেতে পূজো পূজো গন্ধে। এরোস্পেস পার্কের শুভারম্ভের প্রথম চরণ- সকলকে জানাই শারদীয়া পূজার হার্দিক সাদর আমন্ত্রণ।। নমস্কারান্তে- www.aerospaceparkbengalis.in A Grand New Beginning in North Bangalore Durga Puja in Bangalore has always been a festival of grandeur and togetherness, but in 2025 , the celebrations reach a brand-new landmark Aerospace Park, North Bengaluru . This is not just another event; it is our first-ever Durga Puja at Aerospace Park , making it a historic moment for the fast-growing communities of North Bangalore, including but not limited to, Yelahanka, Bagalur, Devanahalli . If you are looking for: Best Durga Puja in Bangalore 2025 Durga Puja near Yelahanka or Devanahalli or Bagalur or Aerospace Park or Budigere Top festive events in Bengaluru …then Aerospace Park Durgotsav 2025 is the event you simply cannot miss . Tradition Meets Elegance From Pran Pratishtha to Pushpanjali , Dhunuchi Naach to Sindur Khela , every ritual will reflect the true essence of Bengali Culture . The sound of dhaak , the fragrance of shiuli flowers , and the warmth of the bhog will create a spiritual and cultural experience that makes this the new Durga Puja hotspot in North Bangalore . Cultural Programs & Community Spirit Mornings especially the evenings at the venue will be alive with music, dance, and performances , featuring Bengali and local artists . This isn’t just a puja-it’s a cultural festival that brings together families from nearby apartments and communities . Authentic Bhog & Festive Hospitality What is Durga Puja without bhog ? Visitors joining as members, relish the authentic Bengali bhog prepared with love and devotion. Whether you are from Brigade El Dorado , Godrej Ananda , Prestige Finsbury Park , Embassy Springs , or from any of the nearby Apartments or Villas, the warmth of this community event will make you feel at home . Nearby Apartment,Villa Communities Around Aerospace Park Within a 10–20 km radius of Aerospace Park , the puja is easily accessible from these projects (click the name for Google Maps directions to D Cube Arena ): Brigade El Dorado Godrej Ananda Prestige Finsbury Park Provident Ecopolitan Kalyani Living Tree MJR North Park Assetz Sora & Saki Sattva BK Halli Purva Zenium Technocon North Maple IG3 Ekta Elements Sammys Beverly Hills Esteem Aero Park Ozone Urbana Hiranandani Devanahalli Prestige Park Drive Adarsh Savana Century Seasons Embassy Springs Salarpuria Sattva Park Cubix Orchid Nirvana Vaishnavi Life Hiranandani Tierra Signature Classic Sobha Oakshire DS Max Sovereign GR Regent Park Hoysala Ace Ramky Serene Woods Embassy Boulevard Villas After The Rain Villas True Blue Napa Valley Villas Adarsh Palm Acres Villas Merusri Antelopes Villas Brigade Atmosphere Villas Hiranandani Tierra Villas Century Seasons Villas Sobha Oakshire Villas Orchid Nirvana Villas Adarsh Savana Villas Vaishnavi Life Villas Ramky Serene Woods Villas AR Villas, Sadahalli NCC Urban Mistywood Villas Event Details Event: Durga Puja 2025 at Aerospace Park Dates: 28 September – 2 October 2025 Venue: Marksman Resort, Game Theory – D Cube Sports Club, Bagalur Main Road, Aerospace Park, Bengaluru – 562149 Website: www.aerospaceparkbengalis.in Let the Chants Begin যা দেবী সর্বভূতেষু শক্তিরূপেণ সংস্থিতা।নমস্তস্যৈ নমস্তস্যৈ নমস্তস্যৈ নমো নমঃ॥ “या देवी सर्वभूतेषु शक्तिरूपेण संस्थिता।नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः॥ ” Ya Devi sarvabhuteshu shaktirupen sansthita, Namastasye namastasye namastasye namo namah Come. pages.title: Bangiya Sangit Parishad Certification
pages.content: Bangiya Sangit Parishad Certification from Bangalore Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore Bangiya Sangit Parishad Certification from Bangalore 14th March 2026 𝒜 ℳℯ𝓂𝒷ℯ𝓇 ℰ𝓍𝒸𝓁𝓊𝓈𝒾𝓋ℯ! Bangiya Sangit Parishad Examinations Guidance by Bengali Association Aerospace Park The Bengali Association Aerospace Park is delighted to guide on how to appear and receive certification from the prestigious Bangiya Sangit Parishad (BSP) for students from within Bangalore. These exams, conducted under BSP (West Bengal), allow students to pursue certifications in music, dance, painting, recitation, and instrumental arts . Categories of Examinations Available Students can appear for a wide variety of subjects: Vocal Music (Classical & Modern) Instrumental Music : Sitar Sarod Violin Esraj Flute Guitar (Classical, Rabindra Sangeet, Nazrul Geeti, Bhajan, Kabya Geeti, Parish versions, etc.) Harmonium Keyboard Synthesizer Pakhwaj Tabla Sreekhol Dance Forms : Kathak, Bharatnatyam, Manipuri, Rabindra Nritya, Odissi, Lok Nritya, Nazrul Nritya, Kuchipudi Rabindra Sangeet & Nazrul Geeti Recitation (Abritti) Lokogeeti & Kirtan Bhajan Sangeet & Shyama Sangeet Painting & Art & Craft Examination Structure Beginner to Second Year ( Adhya, Madhya, Poorno, First Year, Second Year ) Only Practical Exams (No written exams). From Third Year onwards Written + Practical Exams are conducted. Languages for Written Exams From 3rd Year onwards , written exams may be given in: Bengali Hindi English Other recognized languages Important Notes Theory Exam : usually held in January/May , depending on year level. Practical Exam : must be completed by 31st July every year. Age & Education Requirements : Adhya (Beginner): Minimum age 7 years First Year: Minimum Class IV & age 10+ Fifth Year: Minimum Class X or 14 years completed Higher Years: Must submit previous year’s mark sheet + proof of age Why Choose Bangiya Sangit Parishad Exams? Recognized & respected certification across India Structured path from beginner to advanced ( up to Sangeet Ratna & Probar ) Strong foundation in theory + practical Preserves & promotes our rich cultural traditions Guidance Through Association The Bengali Association Aerospace Park will guide students and guardians of Association Members via official whatsapp group with: Forms and application process Subject & level Share this- Hey check this out! pages.title: Durga Puja In Bangalore 2025
pages.content: Durga Puja in Bangalore 2025 | Top Pandals, Pujas, Events & Guide Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore Durga Puja in Bangalore 2025 | Top Pandals, Pujas, Events & Guide 14th March 2026 কোথাই কোথাই পুজো হবে এবার? Click on the above image or below link for LIVE Google Map- https://goo.gl/maps/Rw1yiYLRWtyGoz37A Durga Puja in Bangalore 2025 — A Complete Guide to the City’s Grand Celebrations Introduction Durga Puja in Bangalore 2025 promises to be bigger, brighter, and more vibrant than ever before. What was once a cultural anchor for the Bengali community has now grown into a citywide celebration that transcends boundaries, attracting people from every corner of India and beyond. Whether you’re here for the rituals, the food, the adda, or the sheer atmosphere, this is the ultimate guide to all the top Durga Pujas in Bangalore 2025. The Spirit of Durga Puja in Bangalore Every October, the city of gardens transforms into a festival ground. The rhythmic beats of the dhak, the fragrance of shiuli flowers, and the sight of beautiful idols of Maa Durga fill the air with nostalgia and joy. For Bengalis, Assamese, Odias, and cultural enthusiasts across Bangalore, Durga Puja is home away from home. It is a time to pause the fast-paced corporate life, wear traditional attire, join in cultural programs, and of course, indulge in delicious bhog and street food stalls. Why You Should Join a Pandal, Not Just Visit Durga Puja is more than attending aarti or taking selfies in front of idols. It’s about: Building connections with fellow Bengalis and friends Passing culture to children Volunteering in food stalls and programs Networking within the community Food, Fun & Festivities Durga Puja in Bangalore is also a food festival. Expect bhog (khichuri, labra, chutney, payesh), as well as stalls serving rolls, biryani, fish fry, sweets, momos, and fusion dishes. Cultural programs — from Dhunuchi dance competitions to live music nights — add to the celebratory vibe. pages.title: Puja Barshiki 2025
pages.content: Puja Barshiki 2025 Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore Puja Barshiki 2025 23rd October 2025 Bengali Association Aerospace Park Puja Barshiki (পূজা বার্ষিকী ) First Edition 2025 প্রথম সংকলন ২০২৫ শারদ প্রেরণায় অ্যারোস্পেস পার্কের প্রথম সার্বজনীন দুর্গোৎসব In the Spirit of Autumn The First Sarbojonin Durga Puja of Aerospace Park Art By Arnab Ghosh প্রায় পঁয়তাল্লিশ দিন আগে সিদ্ধান্ত নেওয়া হয়েছিল—আমরা নিজেরাই আমাদের দুর্গাপূজা করব, একেবারে বাঙালিয়ানায় ভরপুরভাবে। Almost forty-five days ago, it was decided — we would celebrate our own Durga Puja, in a way that truly reflects the Bengali spirit. Art by Jui (Kankana Nath Purohit) এই পূজো হবে আমাদের নিজের, আমাদের মতো, আমাদের সবার জন্য। This Puja would be our own — by us, for everyone, and of everyone. Art by Tarosshini অ্যারোস্পেস পার্ক নামে প্রায় তিন হাজার একর জুড়ে বিস্তৃত এক অভিন্ন পরিসরে, যেখানে বহু মানুষ একত্রে মিলিত হয়েছেন, সেখানেই স্থির হয়েছিল পূজার স্থান মার্ক্সমান রিসোর্ট -এর ড কিউব স্পোর্টস ক্লাব, বাগালুর। In the vast expanse of 3,000 acres known as Aerospace Park, where people from all walks of life unite, the location for the Puja was chosen Marksman Resort, D Cube Sports Club at Bagalur. তোমারে সেলাম মঞ্চে তোমার দৌড়ে আসা, জানিয়ে দেয় তোমার সক্ষমতা। দর্শকের মন জয় করে, তুমি আছ সবার উপরে। সবার সাথে কথোপকথন, হয় সবার মনোরঞ্জন। বয়সের ভারে নও জর্জরিত, বেশভূষা বেশ মার্জিত। রসিকতা উপভোগ করে আট থেকে আশি, সবাই করতালি দিয়ে প্রকাশ করে তাদের মনের খুশি। যখন প্রশংসার বন্যা তোমার দিকে বহে, তোমার মুখে তখন অন্য ভাষা কহে। মস্তিষ্কের গঠন এখনও খাঁটি, বাচনভঙ্গীতে জানান দেয় সেটি। তুমি ছাড়া এই মঞ্চ রবে শুনশান, অন্য কেউ পৃরণ করতে পারবেনা সেই স্থান। শ্রদ্ধা জানাই। । By Ruma Roy শুরুতে অল্প কয়েকজন সদস্য মিলে এই স্বপ্নকে বাস্তব করার দায় নেন। In the beginning, only a handful of members took on the responsibility of turning this dream into reality. Art by Subhajit Dasgupta কিন্তু তাঁদের দৃঢ় সংকল্প ছিল অটুট—যেভাবেই হোক, এই পূজো আমাদের করতেই হবে। But their determination was unshakable — no matter what, this Puja must happen. স্বচ্ছ সমাজ পৃথিবীকে করতে হবে দূষণ মুক্ত, সমাজকে করতে চাই দূর্নীতি মুক্ত। ভেদাভেদ ভুলে দাঁড়াতে হবে একে অপরের পাশে , মনের শান্তি আসবেই ঠিক অবশেষে। ধর্ম অধর্মের ঠিকাদারিতে সবকিছু এলোমেলো, রক্তের রঙ দেখিয়ে দেবে সঠিক পথের আলো। মানুষ যদি রুখে দাঁড়ায় দলবদ্ধ হয়ে, এমন কোনও শক্তি নেই পারবে দিতে পিছিয়ে। সময়ের অবকাশ নেই আমাদের হাতে, সমাধানের পথ খুঁজে নিতে হবে একসাথে। By Ruma Roy তারপর শুরু হয় পরিকল্পনা — কত খরচ হবে, কোনও স্পনসর কি পাওয়া যাবে? Then began the planning — what would be the budget, would there be any sponsors? Art by Nikita Burman এইসব প্রশ্নের কোনও নিশ্চিত উত্তর তখনও ছিল না, কিন্তু বিশ্বাস ছিল—মা দুর্গা পথ দেখাবেনই। There were no clear answers yet, but there was faith — Maa Durga would show the way. Now is the moment to move beyond the softness of Lakshmi and manifest the ferocity of Durga. Abandon doubt and embody Shakti (Divine Power). We must bravely confront all oppression. The essence of Maa Durga resides in every woman; we just need to awaken that latent power. On this Durga Puja, find the warrior within and meet lifes challenges with fearless resolve. ~ Satabdi Das By Satabdi Das এদিকে সদস্যরা শুরু করে দেন প্রস্তুতি — পূজোর জন্য প্রয়োজনীয় সমস্ত সামগ্রী সংগ্রহ, কেনাকাটা, আরম্ভ থেকে পরিশেষ পর্যন্ত এক অদম্য উৎসাহে। Meanwhile, members began preparations — collecting materials, organizing everything, driven by unstoppable enthusiasm. Art by Saanvi, Age 7, Class 2 পরিকল্পনা হয় সংস্কৃতিক অনুষ্ঠান, ভোগ, পূজার আচার, পুরোহিতমশাই থেকে ধাকির ব্যবস্থাও। Plans were laid for cultural programs, Bhog, rituals, arrangements for the priest and the traditional drummers. ‌‌ * মন কথারা* ‌ জীবনের হাজারো ব্যস্ততার মাঝে … মনে হয় কিছু যেন হারিয়ে গেছে … জীবন থেকে । সেটাই খুঁজে বেড়াই কখনো মন বলে চলো যাই নীল পাহাড়ের কোলে সবুজের জঙ্গলে ‌ অনেক দূরে …. হয়তো সেখানেই দেখা হবে নিজের সাথে ‌ ‌ মিলবো আমার সাথে এক নূতন শুরু নিয়ে .. By Sangeeta Ghosh একই সঙ্গে ভাবনা চলছিল—আরও কীভাবে নতুন সদস্যদের যুক্ত করা যায়, যাতে পূজো আরও বৃহৎ হয়। At the same time, ideas flowed on how to bring in more members to make the celebration grander. Art by Mehuli, Age 11, Class 6. এই সময়েই কয়েকজন উদার সদস্য তাঁদের সামর্থ্যের বাইরে গিয়ে দান করেন উল্লেখযোগ্য অর্থ, যা আমাদের নতুন আশার আলো দেয়। During this time, a few generous members went beyond their limits and donated significantly, giving us new hope. Powerful Women She walk with fire in her stride, A storm of strength she will not hide. With wisdom deep and spirit high, She lifts the world and touches the sky. Not just a dreamer- shes the flame, Breaking silence, changing the game. In every role, She stands so tall,A force of grace, She conquers all. Preoshi By Preoshi আমরা গিয়েছিলাম আমাদের প্রতিমা তৈরির স্থান দেখতে—যেখানে মা দুর্গার রূপ ধীরে ধীরে উন্মোচিত হচ্ছিল শিল্পীর তুলি ও করাঘাতে। We visited the site where our Durga idol was being sculpted — where Maa Durga’s form was slowly taking shape under the artist’s skilled hands. Durga puja 2025, original pic of our Maa Durga in Clay. শিল্পীদের হাতে রঙ তুলিতে গড়ে উঠল স্নিগ্ধ, মাটির গন্ধমাখা মধুর মুখশ্রী মা দুর্গা। In the artists’ hands, with color and devotion, emerged the gentle, clay-scented face of Mother Durga. Clay Modelling Art by Ishani Mondal, Age 5,Class UKG. মহালয়ার দিন উপস্থিত হলো—সেদিন সকলে মিলে পূজাস্থলে মিলিত হয়ে, আনন্দঘন ব্রাঞ্চে অংশ নিয়ে, এক অঙ্গীকা��� করলাম—যা-ই হোক, এই পূজো আমরা করবই। Then came Mahalaya — we gathered at the Puja venue, shared a joyful brunch, and took an oath — no matter what, we will make this Puja happen. কবিতা: একালের জামাই ষষ্টি। কলমে: নূপুর মণ্ডল। একালের জামাই ষষ্টি। সকাল থেকেই কর্তা গিন্নির মুখ ভারী- জামাই ষষ্ঠী তে মেয়ে জামাই আসছেনা বাড়ি। ঘরে ঘরে খুশির রব বাজে শংখধ্বনি- গিন্নি নিরবে আঁচলে মোছে দুচোখ খানি। গর্ব করে বলে মেয়ে জামাই দিয়েছে বিদেশে পারি- আসবেনা জামাই তাই এবার শ্বশুরবাড়ি। কর্তা বলে শুভদিনে চোখের জল ফেলনা গিন্নি আমার- আমাকে দিয়েই নাহয় সার জামাই ষষ্ঠীটা এবার। আজ হোকনা থালায় পঞ্চ ব্যাঞ্জনের বাহার- কচি পাঁঠার স্বাদ পেতে মন চাইছে আর একবার। শুনে তো গিন্নি ওঠে তেড়ে ফুড়ে এক্কেবারে- বুঝি এই মারে কি সেই মারে। বলে আশি বছরেও ধন্যি নোলা তোমার! নাই দুই পাটি দাঁত তবু খেতে সখ কচি পাঁঠার! নিয়ে কাপড়ে চোপড়ে হয়ে করবে বিছানা সার- তোমার জন্যে আমার জীবনটাই ছাড়খার। এই গরমে কিছু হলে কে আছে দেখার? মনের দুঃখেও কি একটা দিন ছুটি নেই আমার! অন্যায় হয়েছে বুঝে কর্তা নিশ্চুপ নির্বাক- সপ্তম সুরে ভাঙ্গা রেকর্ডে চলে গিন্নির বকবক। যথা সময়ে জামাই ষষ্ঠীর পালা মোবাইলে সারা হলো- এবার গিন্নি সুরে একটু বদল এলো। বলে তাহলে করছি শুক্তো, পোস্ত আর তেল কই- সংগে থাকবে আমের টক আর ঘরে পাতা দই। শুনে কর্তার মুখে মৃদু মন্দ মুচকি হাসি- বলে আজ একটি বার পড়ো বিয়ের সেই বেনারসী। গিন্নির ঠোঁটের কোণে এবার একটু হাসি মন খুশি- বলে-তুমিও পড়ো সেই পাঞ্জাবি খানা হোকনা বয়স আশি। কর্তা বলে তুমি ছাড়া কার কাছে মনের কথা কই-? গিন্ন বলে তাইতো মনের যতো ঝাল তোমাতেই মিটাই। থালা সাজিয়ে দুজনে মুখোমুখি বসি- একে অপরকে খাওয়ায় সুখে মুখে পরম পাওয়ার হাসি। সংসার দোলাচলে এরই নাম জীবন- সকল চাওয়া পাওয়ার উর্দ্ধে মনের বন্ধনে বাঁচার ইন্ধন। বয়সের সংখ্যা নাহয় বাড়ছে বাড়ুক- মনের বন্ধনে জামাইষষ্টি আশিতেও এমনিই চলুক। (সংরক্ষিত) নূপুর মণ্ডল। 13/6/2024 By Nupur Mondal On Mahalaya শেষ মুহূর্তের প্রস্তুতি, দিন-রাত এক করা, ঘুমহীন রাত—সব মিলিয়ে এক অক্লান্ত পরিশ্রমের পর অবশেষে আমাদের পূজো মঞ্চে এল। Last-minute preparations, sleepless nights, endless efforts — and finally, our Puja took shape. Our Banner পূজোর এক সপ্তাহ আগে শুরু হয়েছিল সাজসজ্জার কাজ। A week before the Puja, the decoration work began. Vedant, Age 7, Class 3 , Solar System আমাদের ডিজাইন দল, যা কিছু হাতে ছিল, তা দিয়েই এক অসাধারণ, ঐতিহ্যবাহী, বাঙালি ঢঙে এক মনোমুগ্ধকর প্যান্ডেল গড়ে তোলে। Our design team, using whatever was available, created a magnificent, traditional, Bengali-style pandal. Durga Puja 2025 Original Pic মণ্ডপে ছড়িয়ে পড়ল সাদা লালের মিলনে শারদীয় সাজ, আলপনায় ভরে উঠল মেঝে, ঢাকের তালে কেঁপে উঠল হৃদয়। The pandal bloomed with white and red hues of Sharod festivity, the floors filled with alpona, and hearts trembled with the rhythm of the dhaak. Durga Puja 2025 original pic ”আমাদের সাজসজ্জা, আমাদের আয়োজন, আর আমাদের একতা দেখে সবাই প্রশংসায় ভরিয়ে দি

pages.title: Ai Chatbot
pages.content: AI Chatbot for Durga Puja & Bengali Events | Bengali Association Aerospace Park Bangalore Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore AI Chatbot for Durga Puja & Bengali Events | Bengali Association Aerospace Park Bangalore 5th March 2026 Meet the AI Chatbot on Our Website Bengali Association of Aerospace Park now has a live AI chatbot, accessible directly from the top navigation of our website. No app to download. No form to fill. Just ask, and it answers. Try it now → Open the AI Chatbot — also linked from the main menu above. What Can You Ask It? Think of it as a knowledgeable friend who knows everything about our association and is available around the clock. Some things you might ask: When is the next Durga Puja? What should I expect? How do I get in touch with the association? Where are you on social media? How do I become a member? What is the fee? What events have already happened this year? What activities are there for kids? It will respond directly — no redirecting you to another page, no vague answers. If it knows, it tells you. If it does not know, it says so honestly. Ask in English or Bengali — Your Choice The chatbot is fully bilingual. Use the toggle at the top of the chatbot to switch between English and Bengali (বাংলা). Type your question in either language and receive a response in the same language — including Bengali script. Prefer to speak rather than type? There is a microphone button. Speak your question aloud in English or Bengali, and the chatbot will listen, understand, and reply. The response can also be read aloud to you at the touch of a button. The chatbot understands natural, conversational language. You do not need to use special keywords or commands — just ask the way you would ask a person. What It Knows — and What It Does Not The chatbot is built entirely around the content of our own website. It knows our events, our history, our contacts, our social media, and our community activities. It does not browse the internet, search for restaurants, give directions, or answer anything outside the scope of our association. This is intentional. A focused assistant gives more accurate, more relevant answers than a general one. You are talking to someone who knows our community deeply, not a search engine. How It Works — in Plain Language Without going into technical detail, here is the simple version: It reads our website. All content from our website is collected and kept as a structured knowledge base that the chatbot draws from. It finds what is relevant. When you ask a question, it identifies which parts of that knowledge are most relevant to what you asked. It generates a response. An AI language model reads the relevant content and writes a clear, conversational answer — in your chosen language. It stays honest. The response is always grounded in actual content from our website. It does not invent information. It is secure. Your conversation is not stored. The system is built with standard security practices so that no sensitive credentials are ever visible on your screen. This approach — retrieving relevant knowledge before generating a response — is what researchers and practitioners call Retrieval-Augmented Generation . The associations chatbot uses this pattern to stay accurate and to the point. At a Glance Feature What It Means for You Ask anything, anytime No wait, no office hours — instant answers about the association English and Bengali Switch languages freely, including voice in both Voice input and output Speak your question and listen to the answer hands-free Grounded in our content Every answer comes from what we have actually published — nothing made up No app needed Works in any browser on phone or desktop — nothing to install Privacy-first No conversation history stored, no data retained A Note on Authorship This chatbot was independently designed and developed by an individual member of our association as a personal contribution to the community. We are genuinely grateful for this initiative and are happy to feature it on our platform. The association warmly acknowledges the effort — and equally, the code, its architecture, and its ongoing upkeep belong entirely to the individual who built it. The association does not hold responsibility for the technical implementation or operation of the chatbot. The content of this post has been written by the same individual. It reflects their own perspective and understanding of the work. We share it here in the spirit of community and transparency, and thank the author for both the chatbot and the explanation. Technical questions about how it works are best directed to the author rather than to the association. pages.title: Baap Gdpdi Ranking Global Durga Puja Digital Index
pages.content: BAAP Ranked in Global Durga Puja Digital Index (GDPDI) — Worlds First Durga Puja Website Rankings Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore BAAP Ranked in Global Durga Puja Digital Index (GDPDI) — Worlds First Durga Puja Website Rankings 20th March 2026 Research & Recognition · March 2026 · Outstanding Score As a member of the Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) , I found out that our associations website had been independently evaluated and ranked in a global research index called the Global Durga Puja Digital Index (GDPDI) . It has also given the scope of improvements, from which we implemented few. I felt this deserved a proper write-up, not just because BAAP features in it, but because the index itself is a remarkable piece of independent research that the Bengali community worldwide should know about. What is the Global Durga Puja Digital Index (GDPDI)? The Global Durga Puja Digital Index — commonly referred to as GDPDI — is the worlds first independent research index that systematically evaluates and ranks Durga Puja association websites from across the globe. As of Edition 4 (March 2026), the index covers 256 associations across 41 countries and 6 continents . The index is published under GDPDI Independent Research and is not affiliated with any employer, government body, or commercial organisation. It is entirely open-access and based on publicly verifiable international frameworks including: W3C WCAG 2.2 — Web Accessibility Guidelines Nielsen Norman Group — 10 Usability Heuristics Google Core Web Vitals — Performance Standards W3C Web Internationalisation — Multilingual Standards Gartner Digital Experience Platform 2024 Google AI Principles — AI Adoption Criteria W3C Web Trust Framework — Credibility Standards Every association is evaluated across 11 distinct digital criteria and awarded a score out of 100. The GDPDI is the only index of its kind — there is no comparable global ranking system for Durga Puja associations anywhere in the world. 🔗 Explore the full index: gdpdi.github.io/gdpdi How Does GDPDI Score an Association? Each associations website — not the association itself — is evaluated. The score reflects digital maturity, not the scale or grandeur of the puja celebration. A small association with an excellent website can outrank a famous one with a poor digital presence. ≥ 78 Outstanding ⭐ 62 – 77 Good < 62 Developing Where Does BAAP Stand in GDPDI Edition 4? In GDPDI Edition 4 (March 2026), the Bengali Association of Aerospace Park was evaluated and ranked as follows: GDPDI · March 2026 · Edition 4 · Outstanding Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) 78 / 100 points OUTSTANDING 🌐 Global #13 Asia #7 India #6 Karnataka #5 🤖 AI Rank #1 A score of 78/100 places BAAP in the Outstanding band — the highest tier in the GDPDI scoring framework, reserved for scores of 78 and above. To be ranked 13th globally out of 256 associations across 41 countries — for an association that completed its very first Durga Puja in 2025 — is a remarkable achievement. Notably, BAAP holds AI Rank #1 globally in the index — the highest AI adoption score among all 256 associations evaluated — reflecting the associations investment in its AI-powered chatbot at ragaichatbot.github.io/aichatbot , which allows visitors to ask questions about the association and Bengali festivities. Why Does This Matter for the Bengali Community? The GDPDI is significant beyond just rankings. It is the first attempt to systematically document and evaluate the digital presence of Durga Puja associations worldwide . For Bengalis in the diaspora — across the United States, United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, Europe, and Southeast Asia — Durga Puja associations are lifelines of cultural identity. The index reveals how associations are investing in digital infrastructure to reach their communities, welcome new members, and preserve Bengali cultural heritage online. It also highlights a growing trend: associations that adopt AI, multilingual content, and accessible web design are the ones building lasting digital communities. What Can Associations Do to Improve Their GDPDI Score? The GDPDI full research report (available for download at gdpdi.github.io/gdpdi ) contains individual scorecards for every association with specific recommendations. Generally, associations can improve by: Publishing bilingual content — Bengali and English Maintaining a regularly updated website with event information Embedding structured data and proper SEO metadata Ensuring mobile responsiveness and fast page loading Adopting AI tools for community engagement Making contact and membership information easily accessible Adding accessibility features for differently-abled visitors Publishing Privacy Policy and legal pages Explore the Full GDPDI Index The complete GDPDI rankings — including all 256 associations, their scores, country-wise and continent-wise rankings, and the full downloadable research report — are freely available at: 🔗 gdpdi.github.io/gdpdi Free · Open Access · No login required A Animesh Mondal Member, Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) · North Bangalore AI enthusiast and technology practitioner with a keen interest in Bengali cultural community infrastructure and digital innovation. pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.content: Privacy Policy – Bengali Association of Aerospace Park Bengali Association of Aerospace Park | North Bangalore Privacy Policy – Bengali Association of Aerospace Park . Legal · Last Updated: March 2026 Privacy Policy Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) · aerospaceparkbengalis.in The Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) is committed to protecting the privacy of all visitors to this website. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights. 01 · Who We Are Organisation: Bengali Association of Aerospace Park (BAAP) Registration: DRB1/SOR/220/2025-2026 · Karnataka Societies Registration Act, 1960 Website: aerospaceparkbengalis.in Email: bengaliassnaerospacepark@gmail.com · aerospaceparkbengalis@gmail.com Location: Aerospace Park, Bagalur, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562149, India 02 · What Information We Collect We collect personal information only when you voluntarily provide it through our website forms: Membership Request — Name, email, mobile, apartment/location Event Registration — Name, email, mobile, age, event preference Sponsorship Enquiry — Name, organisation, email, mobile, sponsorship details We do NOT collect payment information directly. All payments are handled offline or through third-party channels. 03 · How We Use Your Information Information you provide is used solely for: Processing membership requests and event registrations Communicating event details, updates and announcements Responding to sponsorship enquiries Maintaining association records We do not use your information for automated decision-making or profiling. 04 · Do We Share Your Information? No. BAAP does not sell, trade, rent or share your personal information with any third party, advertiser or commercial organisation. Your information may only be accessed by BAAP committee members for processing your request. 05 · Cookies & Tracking To provide a seamless browsing experience, we use a minimal cookie management system. These cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences. Essential Cookies: Required for site security and core functionality. Functional Cookies: Remembers your interactions (like closing the banner). Analytics: Anonymous visitor counts via WordPress.com (No personal ID). Control: You can accept or reject non-essential cookies via our floating banner. You may also clear your browser cache at any time to remove stored cookies. 06 · Third-Party Links This website contains links to Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, Google Maps and GitHub Pages. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies separately. 07 · Data Retention We retain information submitted through our forms for the duration of the membership year or event, after which it is deleted or anonymised. 08 · Your Rights You have the right to: Access your data Correct inaccuracies Request deletion To exercise any of these rights, email us at bengaliassnaerospacepark@gmail.com and aerospaceparkbengalis@gmail.com 09 · Childrens Privacy Our website and events welcome families and children. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without parental consent. Event registrations for minors must be submitted by a parent or guardian. 10 · India Data Protection (DPDP Act 2023) This website complies with Indias Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) . As a Data Fiduciary, BAAP processes personal data only for lawful purposes and with your consent. Lawful Processing: Data is collected only with your explicit consent via our forms. Purpose Limitation: Data is used only for the purpose stated at the time of collection. Data Principal Rights: You have the right to access, correct, and request erasure of your personal data at any time. Grievance Redressal: All data-related grievances may be submitted via email to bengaliassnaerospacepark@gmail.com and aerospaceparkbengalis@gmail.com . All grievances will be addressed within 30 days of receipt as required under the Act. To exercise your rights under the DPDP Act, email us at bengaliassnaerospacepark@gmail.com and aerospaceparkbengalis@gmail.com 11 · Changes to This Policy We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The Last Updated date at the top reflects any changes. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy. Questions or Concerns? 𝑨𝑰 𝑪𝒉𝒂𝒕𝒃𝒐𝒕 𝑨𝒔𝒌 𝑨𝒏𝒚𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈! We, the Bengali community in and around Aerospace Park, North Bangalore, warmly welcome you. This platform serves as a living archive-honouring cherished Bengali traditions, vibrant cultural expressions, and the spirit of communal harmony. Across continents and cultures, these festivities becomes the thread that binds Bengalis everywhere. From distant lands to familiar neighbourhoods, it is the time we gather-not just as individuals, but as one global community. Rooted in deep respect for our heritage and with heartfelt gratitude to all our visitors, this site aspires to illuminate the splendour and sanctity of these sacred festivities. Thank you for joining us and celebrating the spirit that unites us all.
